nodes.name: Ad Account Management
nodes.hint: Allow "{app_name}" to manage your ad account information and sign some online terms for advertising purposes. Specifically, authorization is at the user level, which means that when you gain access to a new ad account, the app will also automatically gain access to the new advertising account. Similarly, when you no longer have permission to access an ad account, the app will also not be able to access it.

children.name: Pangle Block List Management
children.description: Block List is a function that prevents your ads from appearing on certain media platforms giving you control to ensure your brand's security.

children.name: Pangle Audience Packages
children.description: Pangle audience packages can help you more effectively reach your target audience, while narrowing down the scope for delivery.

children.name: Pangle Audience Packages
children.description: Pangle audience packages can help you more effectively reach your target audience, while narrowing down the scope for delivery.

nodes.name: Ads Management
nodes.hint: Allow "{app_name}" to read and manage ads. Please note that no matter what kind of permission you select here, the actual operations that the app can perform for some ad accounts might be limited, depending on the access settings of your role.

children.name: Change Log
children.description: You can use the Change Log API to retrieve log data to track campaign changes and troubleshoot issues. You can specify parameters to narrow down the scope of the change log data that you want to retrieve. You will be able to view the time when a change is made, the object that has been changed, the change details, and the operator who made specific changes to a campaign, ad group, or ad.

children.name: Change Log

You can specify parameters to narrow down the scope of the change log data that you want to retrieve. children.name: Split Test
children.description: Test ad groups against each other to understand which strategies give you the best result. Your potential reach will be divided among your ad groups for accurate split test results.
